comments.ticket_summary: Add Field to Manage Phone Numbers on Email Conformation Pages in Admin Panel
comments.author: Novica Vukobratovic
comments.body: This can be tested on qa11: Added two new checkboxes to  admin/geos/{geo_id}/email-landing-redirects  page. One decides whether to show phone number input at all, the other one can toggle that email is mandatory. Mandatory checkbox only appears if the previous one is checked. To test this, you can go to  /uk/e/form-confirmation-3  page to see the form and to  /admin/geos/18/email-landing-redirects/24443  on qa11 to edit the form and test different combinations of phone number options. If you cho

mike_mentions.comment_body: Hey @Mike    You can find the designs proposed here. There are two options in the file

Here are the Proposed designs with the changes. I put different options under each other in the same page     Let me know what you think.    Prototype link from Claude “only for functionality” not design.

thanks for the feedback.  Yes we did agree to only have the offers when they have a match only. That was an oversight from my part after changing the designs. Theyre now removed    Placeholders for images were changed on the designs.. I put images from Origins.   I now realised you said logos. I read that icons previously that’s why I got confused. They were created by Claude and I didnt notice these so forgot to replace them with ours. I just realised now.  Updated with the transparent bg    I

the dark blue and gold color combinations do not feel fresh at all. the ombre gradient.  there is no need to repeat a icon that is similar of the favicon.  https://www.figma.com/design/TC2FN9AV2khKjwAE87mGx6/GDCU-8546----Tinder-Style-Offer-Match?node-id=64-89457&t=Fm1jaNAuOnTpB4dW-4 the light blue variant would suit well. it should be flawless, a person shouldn’t dwell on the dark blue or linger on the colour, good design and experience for widgets. it should be seamless
